name: github-practice-demo
description: GitHub practice project with React and ASP.NET Core

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,dashboard,products,users --prefix-colors blue,magenta,cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run start --workspace @mfe/dashboard" "npm run start --workspace @mfe/products" "npm run start --workspace @mfe/users"
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @mfe/dashboard && npm run build --workspace @mfe/products && npm run build --workspace @mfe/users
scripts.build: npm run build:web && dotnet build MicroFrontendDemo.slnx --configuration Release
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @mfe/dashboard && npm run typecheck --workspace @mfe/products && npm run typecheck --workspace @mfe/users
scripts.test: npm run test:domain && npm run test:integration
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test
